name: workflow-tidy-simplify-this
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>implement>verify>review>audit | scope: diff|recent-files|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,correctness-first,quality-gates{tests,compat,style},deterministic-output | lens: hickey-carmack | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Scope to simplify. Defaults to current git diff, then recent files if no diff exists.

required_inputs.name: FOCUS_HINTS
required_inputs.description: Optional concerns such as memory efficiency, utility reuse, or abstraction boundaries.

required_inputs.name: APPLY_POLICY
required_inputs.description: How aggressively to apply findings. Defaults to fix-high-signal.

required_inputs.name: VERIFY_HINTS
required_inputs.description: Extra checks to run after cleanup when the user has a known done condition.
